form.label: Change Impact & Reliability Regression
form.description: Evaluates the impact of recent changes or deployments on service reliability by comparing pre-change and post-change failure behavior. Helps identify regressions and rollback candidates using log data only.

single.title: Aggregated indicator showing whether recent changes have negatively impacted overall service reliability.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | eval phase = if(_time >= relative_time(now(), "-6h"), "post_change", "pre_change") | stats sum(is_failure) AS failures BY phase | eval delta = failures | stats sum(eval(if(phase="post_change", failures, 0))) AS post_failures sum(eval(if(phase="pre_change", failures, 0))) AS pre_failures | eval regression_score = post_failures - pre_failures

table.title: Compares failure counts before and after recent changes for each service. Positive delta indicates potential regression.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | eval phase = if(_time >= relative_time(now(), "-6h"), "post_change", "pre_change") | stats sum(is_failure) AS failures BY service phase | stats sum(eval(if(phase="post_change", failures, 0))) AS post_failures sum(eval(if(phase="pre_change", failures, 0))) AS pre_failures BY service | eval failure_delta = post_failures - pre_failures | eval impact = case( failure_delta >= 10, "HIGH", failure_delta >= 3, "MEDIUM", true(), "LOW" ) | sort - failure_delta

panel.title: Pre vs Post Change Failure Comparison

chart.title: Visual comparison of failure volume before and after recent changes. A visible increase post-change suggests regression.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | eval phase = if(_time >= relative_time(now(), "-6h"), "Post-Change", "Pre-Change") | timechart span=1h sum(is_failure) BY phase

chart.title: Tracks failure behavior after recent changes to confirm whether reliability is stabilizing or continuing to degrade.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | where _time >= relative_time(now(), "-6h") | timechart span=30m sum(is_failure) AS failures

div.p: This dashboard compares failure behavior before and after a recent change to identify potential reliability regressions.

ul.li: The selected time range is split into two halves.
The first half represents pre-change behavior.
The second half represents post-change behavior.
This analysis assumes a change occurred near the midpoint of the time range.
Use deployment markers for higher accuracy in future versions.
